title: GetResponse vs EmailOctopus (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: GetResponse vs EmailOctopus: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between GetResponse and EmailOctopus comes down to your specific use case. GetResponse is built for online course creators and webinar hosts, while EmailOctopus targets budget-conscious creators and small businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Online Course Creators And Webinar Hosts

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on online course creators and webinar hosts
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on budget-conscious creators and small businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. GetResponse wins for online course creators and webinar hosts, while EmailOctopus is stronger for budget-conscious creators and small businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, GetResponse or EmailOctopus?
faq.a: EmailOctopus starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from EmailOctopus to GetResponse?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
